title: Man beaten to death following dispute at bar in Vizhinjam
content: In a tragic incident, a 38-year-old man was beaten to death following a dispute near a bar in Vizhinjam late on Wednesday. The deceased has been identified as Suman (38), a native of Thiruvallam. The Vizhinjam police said four persons- Achu, Ananthu, Sooryajith and Lalukrishnan- have been taken into custody in connection with the incident. According to the FIR, the accused were drinking at the bar where Suman was also present. An argument reportedly broke out after they stepped out of the bar around midnight, following which the group assaulted Suman. He was pushed onto the road and repeatedly beaten, with blows aimed at his head and chest. In video footage of the incident that has surfaced, one of the accused is seen kicking Suman while he lay on the road, while another repeatedly punches him in the face. In the footage, the voice of a person, not seen in the video, is heard asking the duo to stop, to which one of them responds, There is no blood on his head, while another accused urges others to kill him. Suman was later taken to a nearby hospital by a passerby, but was declared dead on arrival. Vizhinjam Police declined to provide details of the incident and added that the exact cause of the altercation will emerge only after a detailed questioning of the accused.
